arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand explains the one thing 'frustrating' Rasmus Hojlund must stop doing to improve his performances at Man United
arts.sum: Hojlund has endured a difficult campaign so far, scoring just two Premier League goals in 20 appearances - and is currently on a 15-match goal drought.

arts.ttl: Cameras catch Sir Alex Ferguson's reaction to awful Man United performance away at Everton
arts.sum: Manchester United icon Sir Alex Ferguson was at Goodison Park on Saturday to watch his former team face Everton and he did not look impressed by what he saw in the first half.

arts.ttl: Man United and Chelsea told the price tag of transfer target Liam Delap
arts.sum: Ipswich Town attacker Liam Delap, who has scored ten Premier League goals this season, is attracting attention from Premier League giants Manchester United and Chelsea. With Ipswich facing the threat of getting relegated from the top flight this season, they might find it difficult to keep Delap at the club amid interest from the bigger […] The post Man United and Chelsea told the price tag of transfer target Liam Delap appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man United and Chelsea ready to pay €75m for star Mourinho rates as “world-class”
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea have been linked with a move for Victor Osimhen, who is currently on loan at Turkish club Galatasaray from Italian outfit Napoli. The 26-year-old Nigerian international was heavily linked with a move away from Napoli at the start of the season, and he ended up joining the Turkish club on loan. […] The post Man United and Chelsea ready to pay €75m for star Mourinho rates as “world-class” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Premier League forced to release Manchester United statement after lengthy Everton VAR check
arts.sum: The opening goal during Man United's Premier League clash against Everton was subject to a lengthy check.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand's five-word verdict says it all as Man Utd crisis deepens v Everton
arts.sum: Manchester United's misery continued away at Everton on Saturday as they went in at the break 2-0 down - and former United defender Rio Ferdinand couldn't believe what he was seeing

arts.ttl: Premier League issue statement explaining why Everton goal was allowed v Man Utd
arts.sum: Everton forward Beto gave his side the lead against Manchester United at Goodison Park on Saturday afternoon but the goal was only given after a lengthy VAR check

arts.ttl: Man United-linked goalkeeper opens door to Old Trafford switch
arts.sum: Royal Antwerp goalkeeper Senne Lammens addresses rumours linking him with a potential move to Manchester United in the future.

arts.ttl: 'I don’t have any' - David Moyes' cheeky Sir Alex Ferguson quip as he risks Man Utd icon's fury
arts.sum: Moyes was interviewed ahead of kick-off at Goodison Park and offered a warm heartfelt gesture.

arts.ttl: '50 million chances to clear!' | Clinton's take on Beto's opener
arts.sum: Clinton Morrison reacts to Beto's goal to give Everton the lead over Manchester United.
